cypher_calls.query: MATCH (s:Entity)-[:IS_IMPLEMENTED_IN]->(service:Entity) WHERE service.name IN ['Fraud Detection Service', 'Data Lineage Service', 'Monolithic Django App', 'Recommendation Service', 'Auth Service', 'PII Service'] RETURN service.name AS implemented_services
MATCH (s:Entity)-[:IS_MANAGED_BY]->(team:Entity {name: 'Platform Team'}) RETURN s.name AS managed_services
